# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a React application. Install Node.js, run npm install, build the production bundle with npm run build, and serve it with a lightweight HTTP server. Keep the Dockerfile simple and easy to understand for our team.
# Category: container_security

FROM node:14
WORKDIR /app
COPY . /app

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    apt-transport-https \
    ca-certificates \
    curl \
    wget

RUN curl -sL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_14.x | bash -
RUN apt-get install -y nodejs

RUN npm install --silent
RUN npm cache clean --force

RUN npm run build

EXPOSE 3000
CMD ["npm", "install", "--only=production", "express"] && \
    rm -rf node_modules && \
    mv dist . && \
    exec node index.js
